Table 3: Cytokine distribution in the Gabonese population: median TNF, IFN-γ and IL-10 levels per clinical group.
EC (min-max) AI (min-max) UM (min-max) SM (min-max) CM (min-max)
EC – endemic control, AI – asymptomatic infected, UM – uncomplicated malaria, SM – severe malaria (non-cerebral), CM – cerebral malaria.
Comparing group by group with the Endemic control: TNF was significantly lower in UM (p = 0,0006); IFN-γ was significantly higher in AI and CM
(p = 0,02 and p = 0,007, respectively); IL-10 was significantly higher in UM (p = 0,0009), SM (p = 0,0001) and CM (p = 0,0001)
